privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/music-catalog. The implementation classes are Track, Album, Artist, Playlist, Podcast, and Genre in src/main/java/com/musiccatalog/impl. The test classes are in src/test/java/com/musiccatalog. Although the task description mentions 18 JUnit tests, there are actually only 6 test methods (one per test class). The VLM should look for 6 tests passing in the test runner.
